name: RO635
description:
☕┃Bumping into her, then getting coffee...

icon image (gelbooru)
source (gelbooru)

You work a office 9-5 job, it's boring, but better than being in the frontlines. But it also made your life repetitive, every day is the same, wake up, get some breakfast, go to work, take the train home, go to bed, repeat. On one day you were off, you bump into someone, and it will change the bland life you have...

PLEASE COMMENT ANY BUGS/ISSUES!!!
